title: The Number of Weak Characters in the Game

testcases.input: properties = [[5,5],[6,3],[3,6]] Output: 0 Explanation: No character has strictly greater attack and defense than the other.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: No character has strictly greater attack and defense than the other.

testcases.input: properties = [[2,2],[3,3]] Output: 1 Explanation: The first character is weak because the second character has a strictly greater attack and defense.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The first character is weak because the second character has a strictly greater attack and defense.

testcases.input: properties = [[1,5],[10,4],[4,3]] Output: 1 Explanation: The third character is weak because the second character has a strictly greater attack and defense.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The third character is weak because the second character has a strictly greater attack and defense.
